name: XMAX Starry V4
summary: An affordable conduction vaporiser for dry herb and concentrate, suited to patients new to vaping or on a budget.
description: The XMAX Starry V4 is a long-running budget portable now in its fourth revision. It uses conduction heating with adjustable temperature on a full OLED display, charges over USB-C and runs on a replaceable Samsung 18650 battery, so you can carry spares for all-day use. A ceramic chamber and zirconia mouthpiece keep the vapour reasonably clean, and a concentrate pad is included for wax. A practical, low-cost starting point for patients who want a capable device without committing to a flagship price.
